---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve StellarGuard
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ['nishitbhalerao']
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened -->

## 📸 Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## 🌐 Environment
<!-- Please complete the following information -->
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 91, Firefox 89, Safari 14]
- **Operating System**: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 11.4, Ubuntu 20.04]
- **Device**: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]
- **Screen Resolution**: [e.g. 1920x1080, 375x667]
- **StellarGuard Version**: [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash]

## 🔗 Wallet Information (if applicable)
<!-- Only if the bug is related to wallet functionality -->
- **Wallet**: [e.g. Freighter v5.0.0]
- **Network**: [e.g. Testnet, Mainnet]
- **Connected**: [Yes/No]

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## 🔍 Error Logs
<!-- If applicable, paste any error messages or console logs -->
```
Paste error logs here
```

## 🧪 Attempted Solutions
<!-- List any solutions you've already tried -->
- [ ] Cleared browser cache
- [ ] Tried different browser
- [ ] Refreshed the page
- [ ] Disconnected and reconnected wallet
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📊 Impact
<!-- How does this bug affect your usage? -->
- [ ] Blocks core functionality
- [ ] Causes data loss
- [ ] Affects user experience
- [ ] Minor inconvenience
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🎯 Priority
<!-- What priority do you think this should have? -->
- [ ] Critical (system down, data loss)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially working)
- [ ] Low (minor issue, workaround available)
